info.name: Mutual Fund Analytics API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the Mutual Fund Analytics FastAPI backend.

**Project:** AMFI mutual fund + NPS/APY analytics platform.
**Backend:** FastAPI 0.115 / Python 3.13 / SQLAlchemy 2 / MySQL 8.
**Auth:** NONE — every endpoint is public. CORS is the only network boundary. Do **not** add Authorization headers; the backend ignores them.
**Base URL:** `{{baseUrl}}` defaults to `http://localhost:8000` (direct backend). Through the frontend proxy use `http://localhost:3000/api` (nginx) or `http://localhost:5173/api` (Vite dev). The `/api` prefix is stripped by the proxy.

**Generated from:** `context.md` + verified against backend source code in `app/routers/*.py` and frontend usage in `frontend/src/api/*.ts` + `frontend/src/pages/*.tsx`.

**Folders mirror FastAPI routers:** Health, Scheme Master, NAV, AUM, Analytics, Tracking, Disclosure, Market Cap, Portfolio, Dividends, NPS / APY, Admin.

**Seeding suggestion (run once after first start):**
1. `POST /scheme-master/sync` (~30s)
2. `POST /nav/sync` (~10s)
3. `POST /nav/historical/bulk-fetch-all?from_year=2021` (background, minutes)
4. `POST /analytics/refresh-snapshots` (background, after #3)

exec: // No global auth header — backend has no auth layer.
// Use this hook to assert env vars are set, or to log request URLs in console.
console.warn('baseUrl is not set. Default http://localhost:8000 will be used from collection variable.');
// Lightweight global assertions. Override per-request as needed.

item.name: Health
item.description: Liveness + DB connectivity probes. Useful first-call after `docker-compose up`.

request.description: Returns `{status:'ok'}` if the FastAPI process is up.
Opens a SessionLocal, runs `SELECT VERSION()`, returns the MySQL version. Returns status `error` if pool exhausted or DB down.

item.name: Scheme Master
item.description:
AMFI scheme master CRUD-lite + sync. AMC + category lookups feed sidebar/dropdowns.

**Source:** `app/routers/scheme_master.py`, `services/scheme_master_service.py` (fetches `https://portal.amfiindia.com/DownloadSchemeData_Po.aspx?mf=0`).

query.description: Free-text — matches scheme_name, amfi_code, isin_div_payout_growth via ILIKE.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{

request.description: All fields optional (SchemePatch model). Only provided keys are updated. **No auth — anyone can mutate.**
Synchronous fetch from `https://portal.amfiindia.com/DownloadSchemeData_Po.aspx?mf=0`. Marks unseen schemes is_active='N'. ~30s typical.

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: NAV
item.description:
Daily + historical NAV from AMFI. `nav_price` is a VIEW that unions `daily_nav` + `historical_nav`.

**Source:** `app/routers/nav.py`, `services/nav_service.py`.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "amfi_code": "100027",
      "scheme_name": "Aditya Birla Sun Life Liquid Fund - Growth",
      "nav": 401.234567,
      "nav_date": "2026-05-05",
      "fund_house": "Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund",
      "isin_div_payout_growth": "INF209KA12Z1",
      "isin_div_reinvestment": null
    }
  ],
  "total": 9876,
  "page": 1,
  "page_size": 100,
  "total_pages": 99
}

request.description: Reads from the `nav_price` VIEW (transparent union of daily_nav + historical_nav).

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "amfi_code": "100027",
    "scheme_name": "Aditya Birla Sun Life Liquid Fund - Growth",
    "nav": 380.12,
    "nav_date": "2024-01-02",
    "repurchase_price": null,
    "sale_price": null,
    "source_type": "DAILY"
  }
]

request.description: Synchronously fetches one historical NAV day from AMFI. Form-encoded (not query).
Single AMFI call with frmdt+todt. Recommended ≤ 1 year per call (AMFI ~200MB cap).
Returns immediately. Runs quarter-by-quarter in background, skips any quarter with > 500 rows already in `historical_nav`. Track progress at `GET /nav/historical/batches`.

response.name: 200 OK

query.description: Required. Direct URL to AMFI-format NAV text (S3 presigned, public link, etc.).

response.name: 200 OK

item.name: AUM
item.description:
Average AUM scheme-wise + fund-wise. AMFI fyId/periodId model (1..100 × 1..20).

**Source:** `app/routers/aum.py`, `services/aum_service.py`.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "fy_id": 1,
      "period_id": 1,
      "fy_label": "FY 2024-25",
      "period_label": "Apr-Jun 2024",
      "amfi_code": "100027",
      "scheme_name": "Aditya Birla Sun Life Liquid Fund - Growth",
      "amc_name": "Aditya Birla Sun Life Mutual Fund",
      "scheme_category": "Liquid Fund",
      "average_aum_cr": 12345.67,
      "folio_count": 53210
    }
  ],
  "total": 1234,
  "page": 1,
  "page_size": 100,
  "total_pages": 13
}

request.description: Calls amfiindia.com/api/average-aum-schemewise. Idempotent (skips if already SUCCESS in `aum_sync_log`).
Iterates fyId 1..100 × periodId 1..20. Skips already-synced. Several minutes.

item.name: Analytics
item.description:
Pre-computed snapshots, returns calculators, top-performers, category comparison, goal calculators, direct-vs-regular comparison.

**Source:** `app/routers/analytics.py`, `services/analytics_service.py`.

query.description: true → only schemes with return_1y populated

item.name: Tracking
item.description:
Tracking Error (TE) and Tracking Difference (TD) sourced from AMFI JSON APIs.

**Source:** `app/routers/tracking.py`, `services/tracking_service.py`.

query.description: Optional. Defaults to first of current month.
Optional. Defaults to first of current month.

item.name: Disclosure
item.description:
Excel uploads for AMFI Monthly Disclosure, Sub-Classification, Quarterly Disclosure.

**Source:** `app/routers/disclosure.py`, `services/disclosure_service.py`.

item.name: Market Cap
item.description:
AMFI Market Cap Categorization Excel ingestion + lookups.

**Source:** `app/routers/market_cap.py`, `services/market_cap_service.py`.

formdata.description: Optional override YYYY-MM-DD. Auto-parsed from title row otherwise.

response.name: 200 OK

query.description: Large Cap | Mid Cap | Small Cap

item.name: Portfolio
item.description:
Holdings ingestion (CSV/Excel), holdings analytics, sector breakdown, overlap, HHI concentration.

**Source:** `app/routers/portfolio.py`, `services/portfolio_service.py`.

formdata.description: YYYY-MM (regex-validated). DELETES existing rows for the same month before reinsert (idempotent).

item.name: Dividends
item.description:
IDCW / Bonus / Special dividend history.

**Source:** `app/routers/dividend.py`, parser `parsers/dividend_parser.py`.

item.name: NPS / APY
item.description:
NPS Trust pension data: 10 PFMs × ~252 schemes. ZIP NAV ingestion + analytics snapshots.

**Source:** `app/routers/nps.py`, `services/nps_service.py`, `services/nps_analytics_service.py`, `parsers/nps_parser.py`.

formdata.description: Repeat with multiple files; each error is per-file.

response.name: 200 OK

query.description: NPS | APY | CENTRAL_GOVT | STATE_GOVT | NPS_LITE | CORPORATE_CG | UPS | TAX_SAVER | COMPOSITE | VATSALYA | RETIREMENT_YOJANA | APY_FUND

item.name: Admin
item.description:
Observability: file logs, rejected rows, background jobs, reconciliation issues.

**Source:** `app/routers/admin.py`.
